info.title: NJPlastic API
info.description: Web-IoT platform for monitoring plastic injection machines. Captures production cycle pulses via MQTT, processes them in the Spring Boot backend and exposes REST endpoints for the React/Next.js dashboard.

tags.name: Machines
tags.description: Production REST API - machines, status, cycles, pauses, stops, OEE and quality (EP-BE-05 / RFC §7.3.1)

tags.name: Production Events
tags.description: Manual production events - training, cleaning, meetings (EP-BE-05 reopened / RFC §7.3.1)

tags.name: Reports Schedule
tags.description: Report library and scheduling (EP-BE-08 / mockup Reports_Part1/2_V1)

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: JWT login, refresh and password reset endpoints (RFC §6.2 / EP-BE-02)

tags.name: ERP Field Mapping
tags.description: ERP field mapping CRUD (EP-BE-06 reopened / mockup ERP_Part2_V1)

tags.name: Versioning
tags.description: API metadata: build version and identification

tags.name: Production Orders
tags.description: Production order cache reads (EP-BE-08 / mockup OS_Part1/2_V1)

403.description: Role is not allowed

put.summary: Update administrative fields of a user
put.description: Login and password are immutable on this endpoint. The password rotates only through the password-reset flow.

403.description: Role is not allowed

409.description: Email already in use by another user

delete.description: Flips active to false. Preserves the FK semantic in audit_log.user_id (RFC §5.2.1).

403.description: Role is not allowed

put.description: Code is immutable - it identifies the machine on the MQTT payload (RFC §5.3) and on historical cycles.

403.description: Role is not allowed

delete.description: Flips active to false. Preserves cycle history and audit traceability.

403.description: Role is not allowed

put.summary: Edit the message of an AUTO_STOPPED record (UC12, RF18, RF19)
put.description: Replaces the message text and stores the author. The full audit trail is captured by AuditFilter (RF20, RN12). Returns 422 when the record is not AUTO_STOPPED.

403.description: Machine is outside the caller scope

422.description: Record is not in AUTO_STOPPED state

get.summary: List ERP field mappings for an entity_type
get.description: Read-only projection; LEADER and MANAGER can inspect the panel.

403.description: Role is not allowed to read ERP mapping

put.summary: Replace every mapping under one entity_type
put.description: Atomic replace-all: prior rows for the entity_type are dropped and the new list is inserted. The audit trail is captured by AuditFilter (RF20, RN12).

403.description: Role is not allowed to edit ERP mapping

get.description: Filters apply with AND semantics. All filters are optional.

403.description: Role is not allowed to list users

post.description: Login and email must be globally unique. The password is BCrypt-hashed (factor 12) before persistence.

403.description: Role is not allowed

409.description: Login or email already in use

post.description: Author UUID is taken from the JWT. The schedule runs as soon as its cron matches the next minute tick.

403.description: Role is not allowed

get.summary: List the active machines visible to the caller
get.description: OPERATOR/LEADER see machines of their own sector; MANAGER sees every active machine (RN02, RN03, RN04).

post.description: Validates uniqueness of the short code. The machine is created active.

403.description: Role is not allowed

post.summary: Register good/total quality counts (RF10 quality factor)
post.description: Persists quality counts produced during a production order so OEE can complete the calculation for periods covered by the record.

403.description: Machine is outside the caller scope

post.summary: Classify the latest open isolated pause (RF09, UC03)
post.description: Resolves the most recent PAUSED record with reason=null on the machine and attaches the reason and author. Returns 409 when no pending pause is available.

403.description: Machine is outside the caller scope

post.description: Author is taken from the JWT. The target machine must be visible to the principal (RN02-RN04).

403.description: Machine is outside the caller scope

post.description: Re-issues a JWT carrying the same claims as the current one with a new exp. Requires a valid token on the Authorization header; the frontend dispatches this a few minutes before exp.
Idempotent endpoint: always returns 204, whether the login exists or not. If a matching active user is found, an email with a single-use opaque token is dispatched (OWASP A07).
Validates the opaque token, rotates the user's BCrypt hash and invalidates every outstanding token for the same user.

400.description: Invalid or expired token / malformed payload

post.description: Validates credentials against the users table and returns a stateless HS256 JWT. On failure, returns the same generic 401 response regardless of whether the login exists or the password is wrong (OWASP A07).

get.summary: Consolidated shift report for a window
get.description: Aggregates per-machine totals, OEE and the list of manual pauses and auto stops over the window. The sector filter narrows the report below the principal scope; the shift parameter is informational.

403.description: Role is not allowed to request reports

get.description: Retention is 90 days. Filters apply with AND semantics.

403.description: Role is not allowed

get.description: Filters apply with AND semantics. Sector scope is applied automatically before any filter.
Returns inProd / queued / overdue / completed counters from the cached orders accessible to the caller.

get.summary: Edition history of an AUTO_STOPPED message (UC12, RN12)
get.description: Backs the Histórico de edições block of the Modal_Change_Stop mockups (Líder/Gestor). Reconstructed from audit_log; no dedicated persistence. Sort is forced to timestamp DESC.

403.description: Machine is outside the caller scope

get.summary: Current state and timeline of a machine
get.description: Returns the open machine_status record and every transition overlapping the requested window. Scope-checked via MachineService.requireAccessible (RN02-RN04).

403.description: Machine is outside the caller scope

get.summary: OEE result for a machine over a window (RF10)
get.description: Availability x Performance x Quality. When no quality_record covers the window the response is partial (Quality and OEE null).

403.description: Machine is outside the caller scope

get.summary: Paginated production events for a machine
get.description: When both from and to are supplied, restricts the result to events with startedAt in the window. Scope-checked via MachineService.requireAccessible.

403.description: Machine is outside the caller scope

get.description: Returns the full Machine projection with standardCycleMs, toleranceFactor, consecutivePausesToStop and offlineWindowMs. Scope-checked via MachineService.requireAccessible (RN02-RN04).

403.description: Machine is outside the caller scope

get.summary: Paginated cycle history of a machine
get.description: Default sort is pulseTimestamp,desc. Page size is bounded by Spring Data defaults (max 2000).

403.description: Machine is outside the caller scope

get.summary: Aggregated ERP sync status and recent runs
get.description: Returns the top-level connection state, last/next sync window, success rate over 24h, average latency, counters of the last run, the last error message and the most recent runs (capped by app.erp.sync.history-page-size). Status is DISABLED when the ERP datasource flag is off.

403.description: Role is not allowed to read ERP status

get.description: Filters apply with AND semantics. Payloads are returned verbatim from the database - they were already sanitized at write time by PayloadSanitizer.

403.description: Role is not allowed to read the audit trail

get.description: Plain-text semantic version of the running build. Used by the frontend version banner and by smoke checks on deployments without Spring Boot Actuator.

403.description: Role is not allowed

consecutivePausesToStop.description: Consecutive pauses required to escalate to AUTO_STOPPED (RN09, RF17)

offlineWindowMs.description: Window in milliseconds without pulses before the watchdog marks the machine OFFLINE

code.description: Short code provisioned on the Arduino

EditStopMessageRequestDTO.description: New message text for an AUTO_STOPPED record

message.description: Replacement message displayed on dashboards and reports
Editable message for AUTO_STOPPED records (RF18, RF19)
message.example: Stop detected automatically after 3 consecutive pauses

endTime.description: Transition end timestamp; null while the state is active

reasonAuthorId.description: Author UUID of the last message edition (RN12)

ErpFieldMappingUpdateRequestDTO.description: Replace-all body for ERP field mapping under one entity_type

entityType.description: Logical group these mappings belong to (e.g. PRODUCTION_ORDER)

mappings.description: Full set of mappings to keep for this entity_type. Existing rows are dropped and replaced.

MappingEntry.description: Single mapping entry inside the replace-all payload

dataType.description: Data type used to bind the JDBC parameter

required.description: Whether the mapping is mandatory on the ERP side

dataType.description: Data type used to bind the JDBC parameter

required.description: Whether the mapping is mandatory on the ERP side

sector.description: Sector the user is bound to

shift.description: Shift the user is bound to

params.description: Free-form JSON parameters consumed by the renderer
Free-form JSON parameters consumed by the renderer

code.description: Short code provisioned on the Arduino

toleranceFactor.description: Tolerance factor applied over the standard cycle for pause detection (RN06). Must be greater than 1.0.

consecutivePausesToStop.description: Consecutive pauses required to escalate to AUTO_STOPPED (RN09, RF17)

offlineWindowMs.description: Window in milliseconds without pulses before the watchdog marks the machine OFFLINE

QualityRegistrationRequestDTO.description: Quality counts registered at the end of a production order

erpOrderId.description: ERP production order identifier this record refers to

periodStart.description: Start of the period the counts cover

periodEnd.description: End of the period the counts cover

erpOrderId.description: ERP production order identifier this record refers to

periodStart.description: Start of the period the counts cover

periodEnd.description: End of the period the counts cover

registeredBy.description: Author UUID who registered the counts

RegisterPauseRequestDTO.description: Reason supplied to classify the latest open isolated pause

reason.description: Reason text registered for the pause

description.description: Free-text description supplied by the author

endedAt.description: Event end timestamp; null while ongoing

userId.description: Author user UUID; null when the event was created by an automated job

description.description: Free-text description supplied by the author

endedAt.description: Event end timestamp; null while ongoing

tokenType.description: Token scheme to use on the Authorization header

expiresInSeconds.description: Lifetime of the new token in seconds

LoginResponseDTO.description: Authentication response containing the issued JWT

tokenType.description: Token scheme to use on the Authorization header

expiresInSeconds.description: Lifetime of the token in seconds

sector.description: Sector the user is bound to

shift.description: Shift the user is bound to

MachineReportSection.description: Per-machine section of the shift report

confirmedCycles.description: Number of confirmed cycles in the window

autoStops.description: Auto stops detected by the system (type=AUTO_STOPPED) with current message and author (RF20)

MachineSummaryDTO.description: Machine summary view scoped by the caller role (RN02-RN04)

code.description: Short code provisioned on the Arduino

consecutivePausesToStop.description: Consecutive pauses required to escalate to AUTO_STOPPED (RN09, RF17)

currentState.description: Current operational state derived from machine_status

OeeResultDTO.description: OEE result; Quality and OEE are null when the result is partial

availability.description: Availability factor: run time over planned time

performance.description: Performance factor: ideal time over run time

quality.description: Quality factor: good parts over total parts; null when unknown

oee.description: Final OEE = Availability x Performance x Quality; null when partial

partial.description: True when Quality is unknown and OEE could not be completed

ShiftReportResponseDTO.description: Consolidated shift report for a sector/shift window (RF15)

sector.description: Sector filter applied; null when the caller scope already constrains it

shift.description: Shift label applied to the time window; informational only

machines.description: Per-machine sections aggregated by the report

inProd.description: Orders currently bound to an active machine

queued.description: Orders open on the ERP that have not been bound to a machine yet

overdue.description: Orders past their due date (when the ERP carries one)

completed.description: Orders the ERP marked as completed in the latest window

StopEditDTO.description: Edition entry of an AUTO_STOPPED message, derived from audit_log

authorId.description: Author UUID; null when the request was anonymous (should not happen on this protected route)

authorName.description: Human name of the author resolved from the users aggregate; placeholder when the account was soft-deleted

previousMessage.description: Message stored before this edition; null when this is the first known edition of the stop
previousMessage.example: Stop detected automatically after 3 consecutive pauses

MachineStatusResponseDTO.description: Current machine state plus optional status timeline window

currentState.description: Current operational state derived from the open machine_status record

current.description: Open record describing the current state; null when the machine has no transition yet

from.description: Window start used to query the timeline

to.description: Window end used to query the timeline

timeline.description: Status records overlapping the window ordered by start time

finishedAt.description: Instant the sync finished; null while RUNNING

ordersRead.description: Number of open orders read from the ERP

cyclesWritten.description: Number of production cycles written to the ERP

pausesWritten.description: Number of pause/auto-stop records written to the ERP

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the sync in milliseconds

errorMessage.description: Error message captured when the sync failed; omitted on SUCCESS

ErpSyncStatusResponseDTO.description: Aggregated ERP sync KPIs and recent run log for UC08

status.description: Top-level connection state aggregated by ErpStatusService

lastSyncAt.description: Instant of the last sync execution; null when no run has been recorded

nextWindowAt.description: Estimated instant of the next scheduled run; null when disabled or unknown

successRate24h.description: Ratio of SUCCESS runs over the last 24 hours (0-1); null when no run in the window

avgLatencyMs.description: Average duration of runs over the last 24 hours in milliseconds; null when no run in the window

ordersReadLastRun.description: Number of open orders read from the ERP in the last run

cyclesWrittenLastRun.description: Number of production cycles written to the ERP in the last run

pausesWrittenLastRun.description: Number of pause/auto-stop records written to the ERP in the last run

lastErrorMessage.description: Error message from the last failed run; null when last run was SUCCESS or no run exists

recentRuns.description: Most recent sync executions, newest first; size capped by app.erp.sync.history-page-size

bearerAuth.description: JWT Bearer token issued by POST /auth/login (EP-BE-02).
